nasb.text: But the one who hates his brother is in the darkness and walks in the darkness, and does not know where he is going because the darkness has blinded his eyes.

esv.text: But whoever hates his brother is in the darkness and walks in the darkness, and does not know where he is going, because the darkness has blinded his eyes.

cnv.text: 凡是恨弟兄的，就是在黑暗裡，也在黑暗裡行事。他不知道往哪裡去，因為黑暗弄瞎了他的眼睛。

ccb.text: 恨弟兄姊妹的人活在黑暗中，走在黑暗中，不知何去何从，因为黑暗弄瞎了他的眼睛。

csbs.text: 但那恨自己弟兄的，就是在黑暗里，并且在黑暗里行走，也不知道自己往哪里去，因为黑暗使他的眼睛瞎了。
